calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:36 am

Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, KRH Thermal appears through counsel Kevin Sullivan also appearing is Mr. Rutter. Respondent, Tery Carnahan, appears through counsel Andrew Cantor, also appearing is Mrs. Carnahan.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Stumpf.

Previously marked exhibits are referred to, and the Judge reviews them.

10:11 am

Matter is taken under submission.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-12-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Continued To Nov-12-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Continued To Dec-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 1:35pm
Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 608.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, KRH Thermal Systems, Inc. appears through counsel Kevin Sullivan. Appearing with Appellant is Michael Rudder. Respondent Tery Carnahan appears through counsel Andrew Cantor. Parties previously sworn, request a continuance. Judge Karnow suggests they take a few moments and review the file to see if they can come up with an agreement and not have to come back.

The parties request that the case be continued until December 17, 2009.
2:00pm

No new evidence was marked or retained. Related to case numbers 828782 & 828784.
